participant_id.Description: Study participant identifier that matches the PPMI dataset participant ID but also matches BIDS formatting

Visit.Description: Represents each of the three MRI scanning sessions that were used for longitudinal analysis in this study

Subject_ID.Description: Study participant identifier that matches the PPMI dataset participant ID

TimeSinceV1.Description: Time in from the participant's first scanning session date

UPDRSpartIII.Description: Movement Disorders Society-Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale - Part III scores which just represent motor symptoms

HnY.Description: Hoehn & Yahr staging derived from a field within the MDS-UPDRS-Part III assessment

DiseaseDuration.Description: Time since diagnosis with Parkinson's disease to each respective study visit

LEDD.Description: Levodopa-Equivalent Daily Dose; the total amount of anti-Parkinsonian medication for each participant. This number condenses the anti-parkinsonian medication into a single number which allows for comparison across different study cohorts
